connection_drops_during_long_operations.root_cause: WebSocket connections close during extended Claude CLI operations due to timeout handling race conditions

neural_pattern.trigger: WebSocket.CLOSED state during active command execution

failure_indicators: Cannot send message to ${terminalId}: WebSocket not connected
frontend_backend_message_sync_issues.root_cause: Protocol mismatch between raw WebSocket frontend and Socket.IO expectations in backend

neural_pattern.trigger: JSON.parse() errors on malformed WebSocket messages

failure_indicators: setLoadingAnimation({ isActive: !data.isComplete, message: data.message, startTime: data.isComplete ? 0 : Date.now() })
animation_completion_edge_cases.root_cause: Race condition between loading animation state updates and WebSocket message handling

neural_pattern.trigger: Rapid isComplete state changes during heavy I/O operations

failure_indicators: Animation timing inconsistencies during connection state changes
sparkle_animation_timing_drift.root_cause: Loading animation timing drifts when WebSocket reconnection interrupts display cycles

neural_pattern.trigger: Connection state changes during active loading animation

failure_indicators: Permission state management during WebSocket reconnection
permission_dialog_state_corruption.root_cause: Permission dialog state corrupted when WebSocket drops during active permission request

neural_pattern.trigger: WebSocket disconnect event during permissionRequest.isActive = true

permission_response_validation_bypass.root_cause: Permission response validation can be bypassed with specific character sequences

neural_pattern.trigger: Non-standard input characters during permission prompt

highest_risk_patterns: setTimeout(() => connectWebSocket(), 3000) - Connection retry without exponential backoff limits
setTimeout(() => { terminal.current.focus(); }, 1000) - UI focus timing dependency
const interval = setInterval(fetchPosts, 60000) - Long polling without cleanup validation
failure_modes: Memory leaks from uncleaned timeout handles
Race conditions from overlapping timeout callbacks
State corruption during rapid timeout execution

neural_pattern.trigger: Multiple setTimeout calls with overlapping execution windows

failure_indicators: State updates without proper error boundaries
state_synchronization_failures.root_cause: React state updates racing with WebSocket event handlers causing UI desynchronization

neural_pattern.trigger: Rapid state updates during WebSocket event bursts
neural_pattern.recovery_attempts: State batching and error boundary recovery

regression_prevention_strategies: Permission dialog state validation on all WebSocket events
Timeout handle registry with automatic cleanup
React state update batching with conflict resolution
